name: codex-status-bar
description: Native macOS menu bar dashboard for Codex session progress.

interface.shortDescription: Show live Codex session progress in the macOS menu bar.
interface.longDescription: Codex Bar launches a native macOS menu bar app that shows active Codex sessions, task progress, goal state, approval attention, and direct links back into Codex.
defaultPrompt: Set up and verify Codex Bar
